title: Doua lozuri

actors: Grigore Vasiliu-Birlic, Dorina Done, Marcel Anghelescu
plot: Based on I.L. Caragiale famous romanian novel of the same name, the story explores the fun, bitter and tragic experiences of the main character Lefter Popescu in his desperate attempts to retrieve 2 winning lottery tickets that he...
